title: sorghum exaltatum
intro: Sorghum exaltatum is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sorghum family, characterized by its tall stature and yellow flowers. Traditionally, sorghum exaltatum has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing antioxidant properties, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, sorghum exaltatum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being applied topically to skin conditions and wounds.
